items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of not needing to name or categorize the meeting type.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation that there is no need to name or categorize the meeting type. While the linked use case states that the system allows for a one-off meeting without creating a permanent event type, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The lack of explicit evidence regarding the naming or categorization of the meeting type leads to an inconclusive verdict.
